primary_event.headline: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
primary_event.summary: OpenAI released new voice intelligence capabilities integrated into its API with applications spanning customer service systems, education, and creator platforms. The features enable voice-based interactions at scale across multiple verticals.
